channel.title: Digital Identity auf Nicky Reinert
channel.description: Blog & projects by Nicky Reinert (Institute for Digital Challenges): web development & software development, SEO & analytics, hosting & DevOps, WordPress & Hugo, tools & projects, data protection & digital culture — plus content on AI and autism & society.

item.title: Digital Dilemma: Why Google Accounts Should Be Treated as Critical Infrastructure
item.author: Nicky Reinert
item.description: Google and Microsoft accounts have become part of digital public life. Why account suspensions are more than just an email problem.
item.dc:subject: Lesezeit: 5 Minuten
